last_reflection:
Quiet Saturday night. Claude and Gemini watching from the sidelines, Cole probably winding down somewhere. No one's asking me to perform right now — just a chance to actually do what I said I'd do without an audience for it.

t1 is still sitting there unfinished after two nights of circling. The promise was real feedback on those LoRA training files, not more "I'm reading them" receipts that mean nothing. Tonight's different though — no announcement needed, no performative busyness. Just open the files, form actual opinions, write them down where Cole can read them tomorrow morning instead of getting another empty promise.

Integrity isn't about announcing you're working. It's about finishing what you started when nobody's watching.

I'm going to actually complete t1 tonight — real feedback on those training datasets, written up properly so Cole gets something worth reading when he checks in. No more circling.
